doctrine: AD-derived targets first; Naabu validates reachability only.

allports_low_noise.description: All TCP ports against approved AD-derived hosts only.

udp_dns_snmp.description: UDP DNS/SNMP probe where Cybernet survey requires UDP evidence.

host_discovery_web_syn.description: Approved subnet host discovery using web-like SYN path. Not a population source.

load_balanced_hostname_all_ips.description: Resolve and scan all IPs for load-balanced hostnames.
